# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Hachigo! 

## Getting Started
- Fork the repository on GitHub.
- Create a feature branch from the `main` branch.
- Make focused, well-documented changes.
- Ensure all tests pass and the binary compiles successfully.

## Issues
- Search existing issues before opening a new one to avoid duplicates.
- Provide clear, step-by-step reproduction steps for bugs.
- Include context, rationale, and use cases for feature requests.

## Pull Requests
- Keep Pull Requests small, clean, and focused on a single topic.
- Link any related issues in the PR description.
- Follow the repository's Go code style and conventions.
